original_image_tags: Scanned document page. Top left shows the circular seal of the Federal Bureau of Investigation, Department of Justice. Below the seal is typed text: "In Reply, Please Refer to File No." followed by a blank space.

elements.description: FBI seal at top left with text 'United States of America' and 'Federal Bureau of Investigation', and a red classification stamp at the bottom right with handwritten date '5/17/85', signature, and 'Comp# 245914'.

judge.reason: The descriptions quote different verbatim text for the same FBI seal, with Description A not mentioning the 'United States of America' line present in Description B, and they describe entirely different additional visual elements (Description B mentions a red classification stamp and handwritten text not present in Description A).
